| --------------------------------- | --------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Generic/Social                    | Height                | cm                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | How tall are you (without shoes)?<br><br>Write height in whole cm.<br><br>If you do not know your exact height, please provide your best estimate.                                                                                                                               |
| Generic/Social                    | Weight                | kg                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | How much do you weigh in whole kg. (without clothes on)?<br><br>Enter weight in whole kg.<br><br>If you do not know your exact weight, please provide your best estimate.                                                                                                        |
| Generic/Social                    | Smoke                 | 1=Daily, 2=Weekly, 3= Less than weekly, 4=Stopped, 5= Never                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | do you smoke (Does not apply to e-cigarettes)?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Generic/Social                    | alcohol               | 1=Never, 2=Monthly or less, 3=2-4 times a month, 4=2-3 times a week, 5=4 or more times a week                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | How often do you have drink containing alcohol?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Generic/Social                    | alcohol_con           | 1=1 or 2, 2=3 of 4, 3=5 or 6, 4=7 to 9, 5=10 or more                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | How many units do you usually drink when you drink alcohol?                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Generic/Social                    | bingedrink            | 1=Never, 2=Less than monthly, 3=Monthly, 4=Weekly, 5=Almost daily or daily                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | How often do you drink 5 units or more on the same occasion?                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Generic/Social                    | activitylevel         | 1=Engages in hard training and competitive sports regularly, several times per week, 2=Engages in recreational exercise or performs heavy gardening or similar activities for at least 4 hours per week, 3=Walks, cycles, or engages in other light physical activity for at least 4 hours per week (including Sunday walks, light gardening, and cycling or walking to work), 4=Reads, watches television, or engages in other sedentary activities                                                                                                                                                           | If you look at the past year, what would best describe your physical activity during leisure time?                                                                                                                                                                               |
| WHO5                              | who5_1                | 0=At no time, 1=Some of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 4=Most of the time, 5=All the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks I have been happy and in a good mood                                                                                                                                                                            |
| WHO6                              | who5_2                | 0=At no time, 1=Some of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 4=Most of the time, 5=All the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks I have felt calm and relaxed                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| WHO7                              | who5_3                | 0=At no time, 1=Some of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 4=Most of the time, 5=All the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks I have felt active and energetic                                                                                                                                                                                |
| WHO8                              | who5_4                | 0=At no time, 1=Some of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 4=Most of the time, 5=All the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks I have woken up feeling fresh and well rested                                                                                                                                                                   |
| WHO9                              | who5_5                | 0=At no time, 1=Some of the time, 2=Less than half of the time, 3=More than half of the time, 4=Most of the time, 5=All the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | How have you felt over the past two weeks. In the past two weeks my daily life has been filled with things that interest me                                                                                                                                                      |
| SF12                              | i1                    | 1=Exellent, 2=Very good, 3=Good, 4=Fair, 5=Poor                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How would you describe your health overall?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| SF12                              | i2a                   | 1=Limited a lot, 2=Limited a little, 3=Not limited at all                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Daily activities. Are you, because of your health, limited in lighter activities, such as moving a table, vacuuming, or cycling?                                                                                                                                                 |
| SF12                              | i2b                   | 1=Limited a lot, 2=Limited a little, 3=Not limited at all                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Daily activities. Are you, because of your health, limited in climbing several flights of stairs?                                                                                                                                                                                |
| SF12                              | i3a                   | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to your physical health? I have accomplished less than I would have liked                                                                         |
| SF12                              | i3b                   | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to your physical health? I have performed my work or other activities less carefully than usual                                                   |
| SF12                              | i4a                   | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to emotional problems? I have accomplished less than I would have liked                                                                           |
| SF12                              | i4b                   | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you had the following problems with your work or other daily activities due to emotional problems? I have performed my work or other activities less carefully than usual                                                     |
| SF12                              | i5                    | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=Some of the time, 4=A little of the time, 5=None of the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | During the past 4 weeks, to what extent has physical pain made your daily work difficult? Both work outside the home and housework                                                                                                                                               |
| SF12                              | i6a                   | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=Some of the time, 4=A little of the time, 5=None of the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you felt calm and relaxed?                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| SF12                              | i6b                   | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=Some of the time, 4=A little of the time, 5=None of the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you felt full of energy?                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| SF12                              | i6c                   | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=Some of the time, 4=A little of the time, 5=None of the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have you felt downhearted and low in mood?                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| SF12                              | i7                    | 1=All of the time, 2=Most of the time, 3=Some of the time, 4=A little of the time, 5=None of the time                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | During the past 4 weeks, how much of the time have your physical health or emotional problems made it difficult for you to see other people? For example, visiting friends or relatives                                                                                          |
| Sactisfaction With Life Scale     | swls1                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | In most areas, my life is close to my ideal                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Sactisfaction With Life Scale     | swls2                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | The circumstances of my life are excellent                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Sactisfaction With Life Scale     | swls3                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | I am satisfied with my life                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Sactisfaction With Life Scale     | swls4                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Until now, I have got the important things that I want in my life                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Sactisfaction With Life Scale     | swls5                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | If I could live my life over again, I would change almost nothing.                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| The Three-Item Loneliness Scale   | tils_1                | 1=Rarely, 2=Occasionally, 3=Often                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | How often do you feel isolated from others?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| The Three-Item Loneliness Scale   | tils_2                | 1=Rarely, 2=Occasionally, 3=Often                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | How often do you miss someone to be with?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| The Three-Item Loneliness Scale   | tils_3                | 1=Rarely, 2=Occasionally, 3=Often                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | How often do you feel left out?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Munich Chronotype Questionnaire   | mctq_1                | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Have you worked shifts or night shifts during the past 3 months?                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Munich Chronotype Questionnaire   | mctq_2                | Days (0-7)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | How many days do you normally work per week                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Munich Chronotype Questionnaire   | mctq_sleep            | Hour (24-hour format)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | On working days/weekdays: I usually fall asleep at  (This is NOT when you go to bed)                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Munich Chronotype Questionnaire   | mctq_wake             | Hour (24-hour format)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | On working days/weekdays: I usually wake up at (This is NOT when you get up)                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Munich Chronotype Questionnaire   | mctq_free_sleep       | Hour (24-hour format)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | On days off, when I do NOT use an alarm clock: I usually fall asleep at                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Munich Chronotype Questionnaire   | mctq_free_wake        | Hour (24-hour format)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | On days off, when I do NOT use an alarm clock: I usually wake up at (This is NOT when you get up)                                                                                                                                                                                |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds1                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Palpitations/heart pounding?                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds2                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Precordial discomfort?                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds3                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Breathlessness without exertion?                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds4                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Hyperventilation?                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds5                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Hot and cold sweats?                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds6                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Dry mouth?                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds7                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Frequent loose bowel movements?                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds8                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Abdominal pain?                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds9                  | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: feeling bloated/full of gas/distended?                                                                                                                                                                               |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds10                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Diarrhoea?                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds11                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Regurgitations?                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds12                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Nausea?                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds13                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Burning sensation in the upper part of stomacj/epigastrum?                                                                                                                                                           |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds14                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Pain in the arms or legs?                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds15                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Muscle aches or pain?                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds16                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Pain in the joints?                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds17                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Feeling of parasis or localised weakness?                                                                                                                                                                            |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds18                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Backache?                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds19                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Pain moving from one place to another?                                                                                                                                                                               |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds20                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Unpleasant numbness or tingling sensations?                                                                                                                                                                          |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds21                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Concentration difficulties?                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds22                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Excessive fatigue?                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds23                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Headache?                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds24                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Impairment of memory?                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds25                 | 0 Not at all, 1 A little, 2 Somewhat, 3 Quite a lot, 4 Very much                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | In the past four weeks, how much have you been bothered by: Dizziness?                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| The BDS checklist                 | bds26                 | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Have you, within the past 6 months, been in contact with your general practitioner due to one or more of the preceding symptoms?                                                                                                                                                 |
| Diseases                          | diseases_1            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): High blood pressure?                                                                                                           |
| Diseases                          | diseases_2            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Heart attack (Myocardial infarction)?                                                                                          |
| Diseases                          | diseases_3            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Angina pectoris                                                                                                                |
| Diseases                          | diseases_4            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Brain haemorrhage, stroke (blood clot in the brain)?                                                                           |
| Diseases                          | diseases_5            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Chronic bronchitis, emphysema, smoker’s lungs (COPD)?                                                                          |
| Diseases                          | diseases_6            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Brittle bones (osteoporosis)?                                                                                                  |
| Diseases                          | diseases_7            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Cancer?                                                                                                                        |
| Diseases                          | diseases_8            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Mental disorder that lasted, or has so far lasted, less than 6 months?                                                         |
| Diseases                          | diseases_9            | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): Mental disorder lasting more than 6 months?                                                                                    |
| Diseases                          | diseases_10           | 0=No, 1=Yes                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | For each of these diseases and health problems, please indicate whether you have or have previously had any of these (multiple answers possible): I have never had any of these diseases                                                                                         |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_treat            | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Are you receiving treatment or medication for one or more diseases, or are you going to rehabilitation or regular check-ups?                                                                                                                                                     |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_1                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Take a lot of medication                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_2                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Remenber how and when to take my medication                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_3                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Pick up prescription medication                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_4                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Monitor my health condition (e.g. by measuring blood pressure or blood sugar, or by keeping track of my symptoms)                                                                                                                        |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_5                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Make appoinments with the healthcare staff                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_6                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you:  Have contact with many different health professionals                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_7                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Getting to my appointments with the healthcare staff (e.g. because I have to take time off from work, or provide transport)                                                                                                              |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_8                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Get clear and up-to-date information about my state of health                                                                                                                                                                            |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_9                | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Implement changes in my lifestyle that I have been advised to do (e.g. diet and exercise)                                                                                                                                                |
| MTBQ                              | mtbq_10               | 1 Not difficult, 2 Slightly difficult, 3 Moderately difficult, 4 Very difficult, 5 Extremely difficult, 9 Not applicable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | How difficult is the following for you: Be dependent on help from family and friends                                                                                                                                                                                             |
