| SARC-F                            | sarc_1                | 0=None, 1=Some, 2=A lot or unable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | How much difficulty do you have lifting and carrying 5 kg?<br>e.g. carrying a bag with 5 litres of milk a few metres                                                                                                                                                             |
| SARC-F                            | sarc_2                | 0=None, 1=Some, 2=A lot, use aids, or unable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | How much difficulty do you have walking across a room?<br>e.g. walking across a 10-metre room without holding onto anything                                                                                                                                                      |
| SARC-F                            | sarc_3                | 0=None, 1=Some, 2=A lot or unable without help                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | How much difficulty do you have transferring from a chair or a bed?<br>e.g. a dining chair                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| SARC-F                            | sarc_4                | 0=None, 1=Some, 2=A lot or unable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | How much difficulty do you have climbing a flight of 10 stairs?<br>e.g. think of a staircase you often use, or imagine what it would be like to use a staircase                                                                                                                  |
| SARC-F                            | sarc_5                | 0=None, 1=1-3 falls, 2=4 or more falls                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | How many times have you fallen in the past year?<br>A fall only counts if you ended up lying completely on the ground, regardless of the cause of the fall.                                                                                                                      |
| Diabetes                          | diabetes_parent       | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Do your parents have or did you have diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Diabetes                          | diabetes_sibling      | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Do your siblings have, or have they had, diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Diabetes                          | diagnose              | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Has a doctor ever told you that you have diabetes?                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Diabetes                          | diabetes_type         | 1=Type 1, 2=Type 2, 3=Other type, 4=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | What type of diabetes do you have?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Diabetes                          | diabetes_age          | Age in years                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | How old were you when a doctor told you you had diabetes? Write age                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Diabetes                          | neuropathy_1          | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Has a doctor ever told you that you have diabetic foot disease, for example neuropathy?                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Diabetes                          | neuropathy_2          | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Have you had your feet examined by a podiatrist within the last 24 months?                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Diabetes                          | retinopathy_1         | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Has a doctor ever told you that you have diabetic eye disease? For example, retinopathy"                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Diabetes                          | retinopathy_2         | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Have you had your eyes examined by an ophthalmologist within the last 24 months?                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Problem Areas In Diabetes         | paid1                 | 1 Not a problem, 2 Minor problem, 3 Moderate problem, 4 Relatively serious problem, 5 Serious problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Which of the following diabetes conditions is currently a problem for you? That you feel intimidated by the thought of living with diabetes                                                                                                                                      |
| Problem Areas In Diabetes         | paid2                 | 1 Not a problem, 2 Minor problem, 3 Moderate problem, 4 Relatively serious problem, 5 Serious problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Which of the following diabetes conditions is currently a problem for you? That you feel depressed at the thought of living with diabetes                                                                                                                                        |
| Problem Areas In Diabetes         | paid3                 | 1 Not a problem, 2 Minor problem, 3 Moderate problem, 4 Relatively serious problem, 5 Serious problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Which of the following diabetes conditions is currently a problem for you? That you are worried about the future and the risk of serious complications                                                                                                                           |
| Problem Areas In Diabetes         | paid4                 | 1 Not a problem, 2 Minor problem, 3 Moderate problem, 4 Relatively serious problem, 5 Serious problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Which of the following diabetes conditions is currently a problem for you? That you feel that your diabetes takes too much of your energy mentally and physically in everyday life                                                                                               |
| Problem Areas In Diabetes         | paid5                 | 1 Not a problem, 2 Minor problem, 3 Moderate problem, 4 Relatively serious problem, 5 Serious problem                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | Which of the following diabetes conditions is currently a problem for you? To be able to manage complications of diabetes                                                                                                                                                        |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl2_info_1            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I feel well informed about health                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl2_info_2            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I have enough information to take care of my health problems                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl2_info_3            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I am confident that I have enough information to take the best possible care of my health                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl2_info_4            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I have all the information I need to take care of my health                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl3_care_1            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I spend a lot of time taking care of my health and wellness                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl3_care_2            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I plan how to stay healthy and fit                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl3_care_3            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I take the time to live healthy, regardless of what else is going on in my life                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl3_care_4            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | I set my own goals for my health                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl3_care_5            | 0=Strongly diagree, 1=Disagree, 2=Agree, 3=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | There are things I do regularly to get healthier                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl5_interact_1        | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Make sure health professionals understand my problems correctly                                                                                                                                               |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl5_interact_2        | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Be able to talk about my health problems with a health professional                                                                                                                                           |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl5_interact_3        | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Have good conversations about my health with doctors                                                                                                                                                          |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl5_interact_4        | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Keep asking the health professional until I understand what I need                                                                                                                                            |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl5_interact_5        | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Ask health professionals questions to get the information I need                                                                                                                                              |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl6_navi_1            | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Finding the right offers in the healthcare system                                                                                                                                                             |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl6_navi_2            | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Get an appointment with the health professionals I need                                                                                                                                                       |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl6_navi_3            | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Determine what type of health professional I need to see                                                                                                                                                      |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl6_navi_4            | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Finding the right place to get the health care I need                                                                                                                                                         |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl6_navi_5            | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Finding out what health benefits I am entitled to                                                                                                                                                             |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl6_navi_6            | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Finding out what is the best health care for me                                                                                                                                                               |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl9_underst_1         | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Complete forms with health information correctly                                                                                                                                                              |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl9_underst_2         | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Follow exactly the instructions given to me by health professionals                                                                                                                                           |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl9_underst_3         | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Read and understand written information about health                                                                                                                                                          |
| Health Literacy Questionnaire     | hl9_underst_4         | 0=Unable to do/always difficult, 1=Usually difficult, 2=Sometimes difficult, 3=Usually easy, 4=Always easy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | Indicate how difficult or easy you find the tasks below right now: Read and understand all information on medicine packages                                                                                                                                                      |
| Pregnancy                         | pregnancy             | 1=Yes, I have been pregnant previously, 2=Yes, I am currently pregnant, 3=No, I have never been pregnant                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       | Have you been pregnant?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Pregnancy                         | birth_number          | number                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | How many births have you had?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Pregnancy                         | abort_spon            | number                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | How many spontaneous abortions have you had?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Pregnancy                         | abort_prov            | number                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | How many induced abortions have you had?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Pregnancy                         | preg_wish             | 1=Yes, 2=No, 9=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Do you wish to become pregnant?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Pregnancy                         | pregwish_time         | months                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | How long have you been trying to become pregnant? (months)                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                         | preg_gp1              | 1=Yes, 2=No, 9=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Have you consulted your general practitioner to discuss how to achieve the best conditions for a healthy pregnancy?                                                                                                                                                              |
| Pregnancy                         | preg_gp2              | 1=Yes, 2=No, 9=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you like to talk to your doctor or another healthcare professional about how to achieve the best conditions for a healthy pregnancy?                                                                                                                                       |
| Pregnancy                         | preg_q1               | 1=Planned, 2=Partly planned, 3=Not planned, 4=Don't know, 5=Prefer not to answer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | Was your last/current pregnancy planned, partly planned, or not planned at all?                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Pregnancy                         | preg_q2               | 1=Became pregnant immediately, 2=1-2 months, 3=3-5 months, 4=6-12 months, 5=More than 12 months, 6=Don't know, 7=Prefer not to answer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | How long did you try to become pregnant before it succeeded?                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Pregnancy                         | preg_q3               | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know, 4=Prefer not to answer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | Did you receive any form of fertility treatment prior to your last/current pregnancy?                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Pregnancy                         | preg_q4               | 1=Years, 2=Months, 3=Don't know, 4=Prefer not to answer                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | How long did it take to become pregnant after starting fertility treatment?                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| PCOS                              | pcos                  | 1=Yes, 2=No, 9=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Has a doctor ever told you that you have polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS)?                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Dental health                     | den_status            | 1=Excellent, 2=Very good, 3=Good, 4=Fair, 5=Poor, 9=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 | How would you overall rate the health of your teeth and gums?                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Dental health                     | den_teeth             | 1=No teeth left, 2=1-9 teeth left, 3=10-19 teeth left, 4=20-27 teeth left, 5=All teeth left                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Almost all adults have had teeth extracted. How many of your own teeth do you have left? Adults have 28 teeth + 4 wisdom teeth, which are not included. The response category “All teeth remaining” should therefore be used even if one or more wisdom teeth have been removed. |
| Dental health                     | para                  | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Do you think you have periodontal disease? Periodontal disease is also known as “loose teeth disease” or periodontitis.                                                                                                                                                          |
| Dental health                     | den_clean             | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Have you received treatment for periodontal disease, for example deep cleaning and root planing, also known as “deep cleaning”?                                                                                                                                                  |
| Dental health                     | den_year              | 1=Toothache, 2=Tooth mobility (loose teeth) not related to trauma (accident), 3=Treated or untreated tooth decay (caries), 4=Need for root canal treatment of a tooth, which was not carried out, 5=Bad breath (not morning breath), 6=Dry mouth at night, 7=Dry mouth during the day, 8=Pain in the jaw or temple region when opening the mouth or moving the jaw forward or to the side, 9=Pain in the jaw or temple region when chewing hard or chewy food, 10=Click in the jaw joint when you open your mouth,11=Oral cancer, 12=Smell or taste disturbances not related to COVID-19, 13=None of the above | Have you, within the past year, had: (You may select more than one answer)                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Dental health                     | den_lastvisit         | 1=Routine check-up/examination, 2=Pain, 3=Gum inflammation, 4=Tooth decay/cavity in one or more teeth, 5=Root canal treatment, 6=Other problems, 7=Don’t know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | Was your most recent dental visit a routine check-up/examination or due to a dental problem? (You may select more than one answer)                                                                                                                                               |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs1                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Regardless of my weight, I feel just as competent as everyone else.                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs2                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | I am less attractive than most people because of my weight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs3                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | I am very anxious about my weight because I am afraid it affects what others think of me.                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs4                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | I wish I could drastically change my weight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs5                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | When I think a lot about my weight, I feel down.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs6                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | I hate myself because of my weight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs7                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | My weight has a major influence on how I assess my worth as a person.                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs8                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | I do not feel that I deserve to have a good social life because of my weight.                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs9                 | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | I am okay with my weight.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs10                | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Because of my weight, I do not feel like my true self.                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Weight Bias Internalization Scale | wibs11                | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Agree, 7=Strongly agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | Because of my weight, I cannot understand why any attractive people would want to date me.                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Relationship                      | relationship          | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Are you married or in a relationship?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Relationship                      | relation_time         | 1=Years, 2=Less than a year                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | How long have you been married or in this relationship?<br>Please enter number of years.                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Relationship                      | relation_time_1_other | Years                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | How long have you been married or in this relationship? (If years, how many)<br>Please enter number of years.                                                                                                                                                                    |
| Relationship                      | relation_living       | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Other                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Do you live with your spouse/partner?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Relationship                      | relationhappy         | 1=Does not apply at all, 2=Applies a little, 3=Partly applies, 4=Applies quite a lot, 5=Applies to a great extent, 6=Completely applies                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | My relationship with my partner makes me happy                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Relationship                      | relationsafe          | 1=Does not apply at all, 2=Applies a little, 3=Partly applies, 4=Applies quite a lot, 5=Applies to a great extent, 6=Completely applies                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | I have a warm and secure relationship with my partner                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Relationship                      | relationgive          | 1=Not at all, 2=A little, 3=Partly, 4=Very much, 5=Almost completely, 6=Completely                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | How rewarding is your relationship with your partner                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Relationship                      | relationsatisf        | 1=Not at all, 2=A little, 3=Partly, 4=Very much, 5=Almost completely, 6=Completely                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | How satisfied are you overall with your relationship?                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi1_extra           | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as outgoing, enthusiastic                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi2r_agree          | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as critical, argumentative                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi3_consci          | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as reliable, self-disciplined                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi4r_emo            | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as anxious, easily upset                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi5_open            | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as open to new experiences, complex                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
