| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi6r_extra          | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as reserved, quiet                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi7_agree           | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as sympathetic, warm                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi8r_consci         | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as disorganised, careless                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi9_emo             | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as calm, emotionally stable                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Ten Item Personality Inventory    | tipi10r_open          | 1=Strongly disagree, 2=Moderately disagree, 3=Slightly disagree, 4=Neither agree nor disagree, 5=Slightly agree, 6=Moderately agree, 7=Strongly Agree                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          | I see myself as conventional, non-creative                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| AI perception                     | aiq1                  | 1=Benefits outweigh risks, 2=Benefits and risks are equal, 3=Risks outweigh benefits, 4=Don’t know, but I have heard of artificial intelligence, 5=Don’t know, and I have not previously heard of artificial intelligence                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Do you think the benefits of using artificial intelligence in healthcare outweigh the risks?                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| AI perception                     | aiq2                  | 1=Yes, I use it often, 2=Yes, I have tried it, 3=No, but I have heard of it, 4=No, I have not heard of it                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Have you tried to use ChatGPT?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| AI perception                     | aiq3_a                | 1=Yes, 2=Yes, but I would also seek other information, for example from healthcare professionals, 3=No, 4=don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | You are looking for information to improve your lifestyle. A chatbot gives you suggestions. Would you generally trust them?                                                                                                                                                      |
| AI perception                     | aiq3_b                | 1=Yes, 2=Yes, but I would also seek other information, for example from healthcare professionals, 3=No, 4=don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | You are looking for information to improve your lifestyle. A chatbot gives you suggestions. Would you generally trust them?                                                                                                                                                      |
| AI perception                     | aiq4                  | 1=Yes, 2=Yes, but only with a follow-up consultation with a healthcare professional, 3=No, 4=don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | A chatbot provides a diagnosis based on detailed information about your symptoms and medical history. Would you trust this assessment?                                                                                                                                           |
| AI perception                     | aiq5_a                | 1=Yes, 2=Yes, but only with follow-up monitoring by a healthcare professional, 3=No, 4=don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | You are experiencing acute symptoms and therefore contact emergency services. A chatbot assesses the severity of your symptoms. Would you trust this assessment?                                                                                                                 |
| AI perception                     | aiq5_b                | 1=Yes, 2=Yes, but only with follow-up monitoring by a healthcare professional, 3=No, 4=don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              | You are experiencing acute symptoms and therefore contact your general practitioner. A chatbot assesses the severity of your symptoms. Would you trust this assessment?                                                                                                          |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_1                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence from the public healthcare system analysed text and numerical information from your medical records on computers inside the healthcare system?                                                         |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_2                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence from the public healthcare system analysed imaging data from hospital scans on computers inside the healthcare system?                                                                                 |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_3                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence from the public healthcare system analysed audio recordings of consultations on computers inside the healthcare system?                                                                                |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_4                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence from the public healthcare system analysed genetic information on computers inside the healthcare system?                                                                                              |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_5                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence developed by a private organisation analysed text and numerical information from your medical records on computers outside the healthcare system?                                                      |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_6                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence developed by a private organisation analysed imaging data from hospital scans on computers outside the healthcare system?                                                                              |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_7                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence developed by a private organisation analysed audio recordings of consultations on computers outside the healthcare system?                                                                             |
| AI perception                     | aiq6_8                | 1=Yes, 2=No, 3=Don't know                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      | Would you feel safe if a computer programme using artificial intelligence developed by a private organisation analysed genetic information on computers outside the healthcare system?                                                                                           |
| Diet                              | diet_type             | 1=Omnivore (often eats meat – almost daily), 2=Flexitarian (rarely eats meat – at most 1–2 times per week), 3=Pescatarian (eats fish but no other meat), 4=Vegetarian (does not eat meat), 5=Vegan (does not eat meat, dairy products, or eggs)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | What type of diet do you follow? Please select the category that best describes your diet. Meat refers to all types of animal meat (beef, pork, poultry, fish, and similar).                                                                                                     |
| Diet                              | diet_type_duration    | 1=My whole life, 2=20+ years, 3=10-19 years, 4=5-9 years, 5=3-4 years, 6=1-2 years, 7=6 months to a year, 8=1-6 months, 9=less than one month                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  | How long have you followed this diet?                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Diet                              | dietadditional        | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Would you like to answer more questions about your diet?                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Diet                              | greens_1              | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Fruit (e.g. a whole apple, a slice of melon, a small bowl of fruit salad, berries, or fruit compote)                                                                                                     |
| Diet                              | greens_2              | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Vegetables (e.g. an avocado, a carrot, a handful of cherry tomatoes, a small bowl of coleslaw, a large bowl of green salad, a portion of red cabbage)                                                    |
| Diet                              | bread_1               | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten ryebread during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Diet                              | bread_2               | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten wholegrain/wholemeal white bread or buns during the last year                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Diet                              | bread_3               | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten white bread or buns during the last year?                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Diet                              | dairy_1               | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How have you eaten yoghurt or A38 (<1.5% fat) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Diet                              | dairy_2               | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How have you eaten skyr or ymer (<1.5% fat) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Diet                              | dairy_3               | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How have you eaten cheese (<13% fat, or 20+) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Diet                              | meat_1                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Beef or pork (e.g. a burger, a small steak or chop, two meatballs, a mixed meat dish)                                                                                                                    |
| Diet                              | meat_2                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Chicken (e.g. a chicken breast or leg)                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Diet                              | fish_1                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Fish (e.g. a salmon fillet, a can of mackerel in tomato sauce, two fish cakes)                                                                                                                           |
| Diet                              | fish_2                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Shellfish (e.g. shrimp, mussels)                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Diet                              | legumes_1             | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Whole beans or lentils (e.g. chickpeas, kidney beans or butter beans, half a can or prepared from dried beans, whole or e.g. as hummus)                                                                  |
| Diet                              | legumes_2             | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten a portion of these foods during the past year? Plant-based meat substitutes (e.g. a plant burger or two plant-based sausages)                                                                                                                           |
| Diet                              | fats_1                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten olive oil, rapeseed oil or plant-based margarine for frying or as dressing (e.g. one tablespoon) during the past year?                                                                                                                                  |
| Diet                              | fats_2                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten coconut oil, palm fat or palm oil for frying or as dressing (e.g. one tablespoon) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                 |
| Diet                              | fats_3                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten butter (e.g. one tablespoon) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Diet                              | sweets_1              | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten desserts or cakes (e.g. ice cream, a slice of cake and similar) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Diet                              | sweets_2              | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten sweets (e.g. pieces of chocolate, boiled sweets, wine gums, liquorice and similar) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                |
| Diet                              | snacks_1              | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten snacks (e.g. a handful of peanuts, crisps, nachos, popcorn and similar) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                           |
| Diet                              | snacks_2              | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you eaten other nuts during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Diet                              | bev_1                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of soda or cola with sugar during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Diet                              | bev_2                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of soda or cola without sugar (diet or zero) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Diet                              | bev_3                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of juice during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Diet                              | bev_4                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of soft drinks or cordial during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Diet                              | bev_5                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk milk during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Diet                              | bev_6                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of tap water or still bottled water during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                |
| Diet                              | bev_7                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of coffee during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Diet                              | bev_8                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of Tea during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Diet                              | bev_9                 | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of energy drinks (e.g. Red Bull or similar) during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Diet                              | bev_10                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of non-alcoholic beer or wine during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Diet                              | bev_11                | 1=Never/rarely, 2=Once a week, 3=2–4 times a week, 4=5–6 times a week, 5=Once a day, 6=2–3 times a day, 7=4 or more times a day                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | How often have you drunk a glass or cup of beer or wine containing alcohol during the past year?                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Participation in studies          | Question_extra        | 1=Yes, 2=No                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | Steno Diabetes Center Aarhus aims to continuously gain new knowledge about health and disease. We would therefore like to ask whether you would be interested in participating in similar studies in the future?                                                                 |
</details>
